name: TradingView AI Super Score → Perplexity → Telegram

parameters.url: =https://api.polygon.io/v3/snapshot/options/{{ $json.ticker }}?strike_price.gte={{ Math.floor(Number($json.price) * 0.93) }}&strike_price.lte={{ Math.ceil(Number($json.price) * 1.07) }}&expiration_date.gte={{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}&expiration_date.lte={{ new Date(Date.now() + 14*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0] }}&limit=250&apiKey=REDACTED_POLYGON_KEY

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all();

// Sheet Row Builder v4 — Row data serialized to JSON body string
const inp = $input.first().json;
const safe = v => (v === null || v === undefined) ? '' : String(v).substring(0, 500);

const row = [
  safe(inp['Timestamp']),
  safe(inp['Date']),
  safe(inp['Ticker']),
  safe(inp['Strategy']),
  safe(inp['TF']),
  safe(inp['Execution']),
  safe(inp['Signal']),
  safe(inp['Price']),
  safe(inp['Bull']),
  safe(inp['Bear']),
  safe(inp['RSI'] || inp['rsi'] || ''),
  safe(inp['ADX'] || inp['adx'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VIX'] || inp['vix'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Regime'] || inp['regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Daily Trend'] || inp['daily_trend'] || ''),
  safe(inp['SPY'] || inp['spy_status'] || ''),
  safe(inp['QQQ'] || inp['qqq_status'] || ''),
  safe(inp["Net%"] || inp['strat_net_pct'] || ''),
  safe(inp["WR%"] || inp['strat_win_rate'] || ''),
  safe(inp['PF']  || inp['strat_profit_factor'] || ''),
  safe(inp['MaxDD'] || inp['strat_max_dd'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Trades'] || inp['strat_total_trades'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Options'] || inp['opt_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Dark Pool'] || inp['dp_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Cross-Asset'] || inp['ca_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['CA Score'] || inp['ca_composite_score'] || ''),
  safe(inp['SM Conf'] || inp['_sm_max_confidence'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Score'] || inp['_vc_score'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Verdict'] || inp['_vc_verdict'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Pass'] || inp['_vc_pass'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Feedback'] || inp['_vc_feedback'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Red Flags'] || ''),
  safe(inp['DD Halt'] || inp['dd_halt'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VIX Size'] || inp['vix_size_mult'] || ''),
  safe(inp["Pos Size%"] || inp['eff_position_size'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Outcome'] || inp['outcome'] || ''),
  safe(inp["P&L"] || inp['pnl'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Notes'] || ''),
];

const body = JSON.stringify({
  range: "Sheet1",
  majorDimension: "ROWS",
  values: [row]
});

return [{ json: { ...inp, _sheet_body: body } }];
return $input.all();

nodes.name: Grok Signal Analyzer
nodes.notes:
GROK SIGNAL ANALYZER — Portfolio fit analysis via Grok-3-fast.
After VC Gate PASS, before Format Telegram + Alpaca + Sheets.
Non-blocking: pipeline continues on error (15s timeout).
Adds: grok_signal_analysis, grok_recommendation, grok_analyzer_error, grok_analyzer_timestamp.
To rollback: disconnect this node, reconnect VC Gate output 0 directly to Format Telegram + Alpaca + VC Pass Logger.

nodes.name: GTC Poll — 9:35 AM ET
nodes.notes: Fires at 9:40 AM ET (13:40 UTC) weekdays. Configure via state._config.gtcPollTimesET.

nodes.name: GTC Poll — 10:00 AM ET
nodes.notes: Fires at 10:15 AM ET (14:15 UTC) weekdays. Second poll in case position not yet filled at 9:40.

nodes.name: GTC Position Re-Check
nodes.notes: Reads state._pendingGTCCloses. Calls GET /v2/positions/{ticker}. 404=flat=set cooldown. Still open=retry. Notifies personal TG.

meta.description: Signal State Machine v5.16 — core trading pipeline. Webhook-triggered signal processor with kill paths (SENTIMENT_KILL, TICKER_KILL, COOLDOWN_BLOCK, KILL_GATE, DD_HALT), VC Gate scoring, Grok AI analysis, Alpaca bracket order execution, and GTC position re-check.
meta.restore_notes: Secrets have been redacted. After importing, update these in n8n: 1) Alpaca API Key/Secret in Code nodes, 2) xAI Grok API key in Grok AI Analysis node, 3) Telegram bot token + chat ID in all Telegram send nodes, 4) n8n API key in Dead-Man's Switch references
meta.changelog: v5.19: C-6 audit fix — per-position notional cap (10% equity), sector concentration limit (25% equity), total exposure cap (80%), leveraged ETF multiplier, Telegram warnings at 80% of limits.
